data.name: A11y_BtnCopyDesc
data.value: Copies the text from the input box to the clipboard.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the copy button, explaining its function (copying to clipboard).

data.name: A11y_BtnCopyName
data.comment: Accessibility name label for the copy button.

data.name: A11y_Cannot_Delete
data.comment: Accessibility message played when backspacing at the beginning of the text fails to delete anything.

data.name: A11y_Capture_Cancelled
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the user cancels the hotkey capture process.

data.name: A11y_Capture_Esc_Cancel
data.comment: Accessibility message informing the user that they can press the ESC key to cancel the capture.

data.name: A11y_Delete_Char
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a single character is deleted. {0} is the character that was deleted.

data.name: A11y_CurrentValue
data.comment: Accessibility message displaying the current value in a settings dialog. {0} is the current value.

data.name: A11y_Hotkey_Captured
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a new hotkey is successfully captured. {0} is the formatted hotkey string.

data.name: A11y_MainFormDesc
data.value: Press A or Start to open keyboard when empty, or copy and return when text is entered. Use X to backspace, D-pad to move cursor or history. Press Back to return. LB+RB+B to quick return. Keyboard: Enter to copy/open, Esc to clear, Up/Down for history, Alt+B to return.
data.comment: Detailed accessibility description of the main window, explaining various controller and keyboard operations.

data.name: A11y_Returning
data.comment: Accessibility message played when an action (like copying) is completed and the app is about to return focus to the previous window.

data.name: A11y_MainFormName
data.comment: Accessibility name label for the main window.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Bottom
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the cursor reaches the end of the text.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Newest
data.comment: Accessibility message played when navigating history and returning to the most recent input.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Oldest
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the user reaches the oldest item in the input history and there are no more records.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Top
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the cursor reaches the beginning of the text.

data.name: A11y_No_Text_To_Copy
data.comment: Accessibility message played when attempting to copy while the input field is empty.

data.name: A11y_TBInputDesc
data.value: Enter the text you want to copy to the clipboard here.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the input field, guiding the user to enter text.

data.name: A11y_TBInputName
data.comment: Accessibility name label for the text input field.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Main
data.comment: Accessibility label for the main layout container.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Main_Desc
data.value: The primary container for text input and action buttons.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the main layout container.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Input
data.comment: Accessibility label for the input area container.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Input_Desc
data.value: The container housing the text input field.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the input area container.

data.name: App_Title
data.comment: Application name, used for the window title and in message dialogs.

data.name: Btn_CopyDefault
data.comment: Default display text for the copy button.

data.name: Err_ConfigInvalid
data.value: The configuration file format is invalid. The application will start with default settings.
data.comment: Error message displayed when the configuration file is corrupted or formatted incorrectly.

data.name: Err_HotkeyRegFail
data.value:
Global shortcut {0} failed to register.
Make sure that multiple instances of this application are not running at the same time, or that another application is not already using this shortcut.
data.comment: Detailed error message displayed when global hotkey registration fails. {0} is the hotkey that failed to register.

data.name: Err_Title
data.comment: Title text for error dialog boxes.

data.name: Err_TouchKeyboardNotFound
data.comment: Error message displayed when the system touch keyboard cannot be launched.

data.name: Menu_CaptureKey
data.comment: Context menu item used to begin capturing a new wake-up key.

data.name: Menu_CaptureKey_Desc
data.value: Start capturing a new key from the keyboard.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the capture key menu item.

data.name: Menu_ClearHistory
data.comment: Context menu item used to clear the input history.

data.name: Menu_ClearHistory_Desc
data.value: Permanently clear all input records currently in memory.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the clear history menu item.

data.name: Menu_HotkeySettings
data.comment: Name of the context sub-menu for hotkey-related settings.

data.name: Menu_HotkeySettings_Desc
data.value: Configure the global shortcut keys to wake up the input box.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the hotkey settings sub-menu.

data.name: Menu_PrivacyMode
data.comment: Context menu item for toggling privacy mode (preventing input recording).

data.name: Menu_PrivacyMode_Desc
data.value: When enabled, new inputs will not be saved to history.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the privacy mode menu item.

data.name: Mod_Alt
data.comment: Display name for the Alt modifier key in the settings menu.

data.name: Mod_Ctrl
data.comment: Display name for the Ctrl modifier key in the settings menu.

data.name: Mod_Shift
data.comment: Display name for the Shift modifier key in the settings menu.

data.name: Mod_Win
data.comment: Display name for the Windows key modifier in the settings menu.

data.name: Msg_Copied
data.comment: Temporary status text shown on the button after a successful copy operation.

data.name: Msg_CopyFail
data.comment: Status text shown on the button when a copy operation fails.

data.name: Msg_HotkeyUpdated
data.comment: Status message displayed in the window title or on a button after a successful hotkey update.

data.name: Msg_InputCleared
data.comment: Status message shown after the input field content has been cleared.

data.name: Msg_PressAnyKey
data.comment: Prompt displayed when the app enters capture mode, asking the user to press a key.

data.name: Pht_TBInput
data.comment: Placeholder text displayed in the input field when it is empty.

data.name: Wrn_Title
data.comment: Title text for warning dialog boxes.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_Connected
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a controller connection is detected. {0} is the controller index or name.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_Disconnected
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a controller is disconnected. {0} is the controller index or name.

data.name: A11y_Delete_Multiple
data.comment: Accessibility message played when multiple characters are deleted at once. {0} is the number of characters deleted.

data.name: A11y_New_Line
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a new line is added to the input field.

data.name: Err_HotkeyRegFail_Brief
data.value: Hotkey registration failed. Reverted to previous setting.
data.comment: Brief error message shown when hotkey registration fails and the setting is reverted.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_Fallback
data.value: GameInput initialization failed. Switched to XInput compatibility mode.
data.comment: Accessibility message played when GameInput is unavailable and the app switches to XInput compatibility mode.

data.name: A11y_PrivacyMode_On
data.comment: Accessibility message played when privacy mode is turned on.

data.name: A11y_PrivacyMode_Off
data.comment: Accessibility message played when privacy mode is turned off.

data.name: A11y_History_Navigation
data.comment: Accessibility message used when navigating through history. {0} is the current index, {1} is the total number of records, and {2} is the content of that record.

data.name: A11y_Startup_Status
data.comment: Summary of the accessibility status at startup. {0} is the privacy mode status, and {1} is the current wake-up hotkey.

data.name: Menu_Settings
data.comment: Name of the context sub-menu containing various advanced settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Window
data.comment: Context menu item for accessing window and operation settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Feedback
data.comment: Context menu item for accessing vibration feedback settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Gamepad
data.comment: Context menu item for accessing gamepad-related settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Vibration
data.comment: Context menu item for toggling the vibration switch.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Intensity
data.comment: Context menu item showing and setting vibration intensity. {0} is the current percentage value.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Provider
data.comment: Context menu item showing the current controller API provider.

data.name: Menu_Settings_HistoryCapacity
data.comment: Context menu item showing and setting history capacity. {0} is the current capacity value.

data.name: Settings_WindowRestoreDelay
data.comment: Name of the setting for window restore delay.

data.name: Settings_ClipboardRetryDelay
data.comment: Name of the setting for the interval between clipboard retry attempts.

data.name: Settings_TouchKeyboardDismissDelay
data.comment: Name of the setting for touch keyboard dismissal delay.

data.name: Settings_WindowSwitchBufferBase
data.comment: Name of the setting for window switch buffer time.

data.name: Settings_InputJitterRange
data.comment: Name of the setting for gamepad input jitter range.

data.name: Settings_HistoryCapacity
data.comment: Name of the setting for the history record limit.

data.name: Settings_ThumbDeadzoneEnter
data.comment: Name of the setting for the stick deadzone trigger threshold.

data.name: Settings_ThumbDeadzoneExit
data.comment: Name of the setting for the stick deadzone reset threshold.

data.name: Settings_RepeatDelay
data.comment: Name of the setting for gamepad button repeat delay.

data.name: Settings_RepeatSpeed
data.comment: Name of the setting for gamepad button repeat speed.

data.name: Msg_RestartRequired
data.value: This change requires a restart to take effect. Restart now?
data.comment: Prompt informing the user that certain settings changes require an app restart to take effect.

data.name: Msg_EnterValue
data.value: Please enter a new value for {0}:
data.comment: Prompt text in the value input dialog. {0} is the name of the setting being configured.

data.name: Btn_OK
data.comment: Text for the OK button in dialog boxes.

data.name: Btn_Cancel
data.comment: Text for the Cancel button in dialog boxes.

data.name: Btn_SetDefault
data.comment: Text for the button that resets settings to their default values.

data.name: Settings_VibrationIntensity
data.comment: Name of the setting for adjusting vibration intensity.

data.name: A11y_Menu_NumericDesc
data.comment: Accessibility description template for numeric menu items. {0} is the name, {1} is the current value, {2} is the minimum, and {3} is the maximum.

data.name: A11y_Mod_Toggle_Desc
data.value: Toggle {0} as a modifier for the wake up hotkey.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the modifier toggle item. {0} is the name of the modifier key.

data.name: A11y_Value_Range_Desc
data.comment: Accessibility description for the numeric input field, including range information. {0} is the current value, {1} is the minimum, and {2} is the maximum.

data.name: A11y_Btn_OK_Desc
data.value: Confirm and apply the current value.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the OK button.

data.name: A11y_Btn_Cancel_Desc
data.value: Cancel changes and close the dialog.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Cancel button.

data.name: A11y_Btn_SetDefault_Desc
data.value: Reset the value to the factory default: {0}.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the reset to default button. {0} is the factory default value for the item.

data.name: A11y_Mod_On
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a modifier key is enabled. {0} is the name of the modifier.

data.name: A11y_Mod_Off
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a modifier key is disabled. {0} is the name of the modifier.

data.name: A11y_Mod_Key_Missing
data.comment: Accessibility message reminding the user that the main wake-up key has not been set yet.

data.name: A11y_Clipboard_Retrying
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the clipboard is occupied and the app is automatically retrying.

data.name: A11y_Cancelled
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a general operation is cancelled.

data.name: A11y_Opening_Keyboard
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the app is about to launch the touch keyboard.

data.name: App_Privacy_Suffix
data.comment: Icon suffix added to the window title when privacy mode is enabled.

data.name: App_Gamepad_Suffix
data.comment: Controller information displayed in the window title. {0} is the controller name.

data.name: App_Gamepad_XInput_Format
data.comment: Format for XInput device names. {0} is the controller index.

data.name: A11y_Background_Error
data.comment: Accessibility message reporting a background task error. {0} is the detailed error information.

data.name: A11y_ButtonArea
data.comment: Accessibility group label for the primary action button area.

data.name: Menu_Exit
data.comment: Context menu item used to close and exit the application.

data.name: A11y_TargetWindowLost
data.value: Cannot return: The target window has been closed.
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt when the user attempts to return to the previous window, but that window no longer exists.
